origin.label: AdMatix proof artifact manifest
origin.description: Aggregate-only proof evidence from CX-2 validation, CX-3 head-to-head benchmark, and CX-4 public RCT backtests. No raw Criteo or Hillstrom rows are included.

claim_limits: Supports calibrated simulator plus public RCT/backtest evidence for evidence-gated verification behavior.
Does not prove live paid-media spend lift.
Does not include raw Criteo or Hillstrom data.
Criteo/Hillstrom outputs are aggregate-only and must preserve source license constraints.
Dashboard data remains demo/unavailable until artifact-specific dashboard schema is released.

artifacts.claim_limit: Simulator/verifier calibration evidence only; robustness worlds prove no confident wrong claim, not guaranteed lift recovery.
Head-to-head benchmark contains real Claude subscription buyer rows, but remains simulated paid-media evidence.
Public RCT/backtest recovery evidence only; Criteo license is non-commercial/share-alike and raw data is not redistributed.
